channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck Demand Faces Reality Check
item.description: SpaceX absorbed nearly one in five Q4 registrations

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck Demand Gets Boost From Inside
item.description: Musk companies account for notable share of sales

item.title: How to Get a Piece of SpaceX Stock Ahead of the Crowd
item.description: The big SpaceX IPO could arrive as early as June, and it’s going to be a record-breaker in terms of size and excitement. Whether the price of admission implies a valuation north of $2 trillion (that’s on the high end) on the opening day or more, the big launch is going to draw some pretty ... How...

item.title: Tesla AI5 Chip Milestone Tests Robotic And Autonomy Ambitions
item.description: Tesla, NasdaqGS:TSLA, has completed the tape out for its new AI5 chip, marking the final design phase for its latest in house AI processor. The company has also outlined progress on its follow up AI6 chip and Dojo3 system, highlighting a faster cadence in custom AI hardware development. Managemen...

item.title: Tesla Optimus V3 hand and arm details revealed in new patents
item.description: Tesla is planning to soon reveal its latest and greatest version of the Optimus humanoid robot, and a series of new patents for the hands and arms, with the former being, admittedly, one of the most challenging parts of developing the project. Two new patents, which were coincidentally filed on t...

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck sales bolstered by Musk’s other companies, data shows
item.description: Sales of Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA)’s Cybertruck have recently been supported in part by purchases from other businesses controlled by CEO Elon Musk, highlighting challenges the electric pickup faces in attracting broader consumer demand. Data from S&P Global Mobility cited by Bloomberg News...

item.title: Tesla makes Signature Edition buyers sign no-resale agreement with $50,000 penalty
item.description: Tesla is requiring buyers of its limited Signature Edition Model S and Model X to sign a “No Resale Agreement” that threatens $50,000 in liquidated damages, or the full resale value, whichever is greater, if they flip the vehicle within the first year. An invited buyer shared the agreement with E...

item.title: 2026 Strategic Profiling of North America' Leading Automotive OEMs' Connected Services: Rivian, Ford, Stellantis, Ram, Chrysler, Jeep, Dodge, Lincoln, GM, Tesla
item.description: Significant growth opportunities exist in connected services, particularly in infotainment, safety, and EV-specific offerings. North American automakers are capitalizing on software-defined platforms and strategic EV expansions, enhancing digital experiences, and regionalizing services to stay co...

item.title: Lam Research Drawn Into Musk’s Terafab AI Chip Ambitions
item.description: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) has been identified as a supplier engaged by Elon Musk’s Terafab initiative, a new AI chip complex involving Tesla, SpaceX, Intel, and xAI. Terafab is seeking pricing and delivery timelines from leading semiconductor equipment makers, including Lam Research, for advan...

item.title: Next Generation Electric Vehicles OEM Strategy Analysis Report 2026 Featuring VW, BMW, Ford, GM, Hyundai, Stellantis, Nio, Toyota, VinFast, BYD, Mercedes-Benz, Tesla
item.description: The EV market offers opportunities in mass-market EV development, adoption of alternative battery chemistries and 800V architecture, and universal platforms to accelerate adoption. OEMs are revisiting electrification targets, focusing on circularity and sustainability amidst supply chain challeng...

item.title: BYD’s new Sealion 05 EV is a smart electric SUV that’s cheaper than it looks
item.description: It’s slightly smaller than the Tesla Model Y but costs less than half as much. BYD unveiled the new Sealion 05 EV and PHEV days ahead of their official debut. The entry-level electric SUV is equipped with BYD’s “God’s Eye” smart driving system and starts at just around $16,000.

item.title: Musk Pushes Terafab Suppliers to Move at 'Light Speed'
item.description: Elon Musk's staff working on his envisioned Terafab joint venture between Tesla Inc. and SpaceX have reached out to chip industry suppliers seeking price quotes and delivery times for chipmaking gear. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Preview: Why The Dream Is Breaking Down
Tesla Stock Value To $2 Trillion?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) stock surged by close to 7% on Wednesday, taking its market cap to roughly $1.2 trillion, amid news that its latest AI5 chips were ready to move into production.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck sales inflated: SpaceX bought 1,279 units
item.description: New registration data confirms what Electrek has been reporting for six months: Tesla’s Cybertruck sales are being propped up by Elon Musk’s other companies. SpaceX alone bought 1,279 Cybertrucks in Q4 2025 — 18% of every Cybertruck registered in the US that quarter. Without those inter-company p...

item.title: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold Tesla Stock at $390?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is a Hold at $390. The stock has down 11% year to date while the company navigates a painful transition: Automotive volumes are declining, costs are rising, and the next wave of growth catalysts remains largely unproven. The bull case is real, but so is the risk of paying a pr...

item.title: What Happens If Tesla's Robotaxi Service Flops?
item.description: Tesla has been teasing the idea of a fully autonomous vehicle fleet for years.

item.title: TSLA's 5-Day Win Streak: AI5 Chip, Terafab & UBS Boost - Is it a Buy?
item.description: TSLA jumps on AI5 chip progress, Terafab momentum, and a UBS upgrade, but EV weakness and execution risks raise questions on whether the stock is a buy now.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Nvidia Chipmaker Falls; S&P 500, Nasdaq At Highs, Led By Tesla, Robinhood
item.description: Futures rose but Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semi fell on earnings: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit highs led by former leaders Tesla and Robinhood.

item.title: SpaceX Was Buying Cybertrucks in Bulk. Tesla Didn’t Tell Anyone.
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shareholders are about to start asking a pointed question: why did they have to find out from outside reporting that SpaceX was purchasing Cybertrucks in bulk, as Bloomberg is reporting?> Elon Musk controls both companies, which makes any commercial arrangement between them a ...

item.title: ‘What Happened to the Tesla Killers?’ Elon Musk Taunts, but One Rival CEO Is Playing Offense
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has publicly taunted rivals: “What happened to all the Tesla killers?” With Tesla holding over 54% of the U.S. electric vehicle (EV) market share in Q1 2026, the taunt carries weight. But the competitive landscape is more nuanced than a single market share figur...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises. How It’s Joining the Rally in a Big Way.
item.description: Shares of the electric vehicle maker rose 1.2% to $396.85 in premarket trading, while and futures were 0.1% higher and flat, respectively. Wall Street is looking for earnings per share of 38 cents.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck Sales Were Inflated by a SpaceX Buying Spree
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Sales of Tesla Inc.’s Cybertruck have been propped up in recent months by Elon Musk’s other companies, an unusual arrangement that further indicates the polarizing pickup is failing to appeal to everyday buyers.SpaceX, the Musk-led rocket and satellite maker, accounted for 1,279 — ...

item.title: 2 Reasons to Buy Tesla Before April 22
item.description: If Tesla is successful with its lower-cost SUV and continues surging abroad, the stock should rebound.

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla, SpaceX Joint Venture Terafab Scrambling to Procure Chipmaking Gear
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) Chief Executive Elon Musk's deputies are pressing chip industry suppliers, including A

item.title: Musk Asks Suppliers to Move at ‘Light Speed’ on New Chipmaking Plan
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk’s lieutenants have reached out to chip industry suppliers including Applied Materials Inc., Tokyo Electron Ltd. and Lam Research Corp. for his envisioned Terafab, early steps in an audacious and likely arduous attempt to break into the production of cutting-edge chips.

item.title: Battery Maker CATL’s Profit Climbs Despite Slowing China EV Sales
item.description: The Tesla supplier’s profit climbed even as changes to government subsidies and tax benefits dented demand in China for EV batteries.

item.title: Why Are Tesla (TSLA) Shares Soaring Today
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) jumped 7.4% in the afternoon session after CEO Elon Musk announced a major breakthrough for the company’s future technology.

item.title: Tesla analysts get nervous heading into Q1 print
item.description: You wouldn't know it from CEO Elon Musk's racism-baiting posts on X (the former Twitter), but Tesla analysts at TD Cowen and Barclays have some serious concerns heading into the company's first-quarter earnings print. Musk has been on the defensive since the company reported its preliminary Q1 ...

item.title: Elon Musk's father claims Tesla CEO and his brother hold BTC
item.description: Errol Musk, father of Tesla (Nasdaq: TSLA) and SpaceX founder Elon Musk, has revealed that his two sons hold a considerable amount of Bitcoin (BTC). The claim came during an exclusive interview with BeInCrypto, in which the 79-year-old South African engineer also offered an unusually candid view ...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit New Highs As Tesla, Robinhood Lead; Nvidia Chipmaker On Tap
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit highs as Tesla, Robinhood and other former leaders soared. Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semi looms.

item.title: Ford EV and tech chief leaving automaker
item.description: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.

item.title: Gary Black Calls Tesla's FSD Approval In Europe 'Non-Event'—Here's Why
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC on Monday outlined multiple reasons why Tesla Inc.‘s Full Self-Driving (FSD) approval by the Netherlands Vehicle Authority (RDW) wasn’t significant. Tesla FSD Europe Approval A ‘Non-Event’ “WS [Wall Street] will view the approval of FSD in the Netherland...

item.title: Tesla's Stock Had One of Its Best Days in Months. Here's Why It Popped
item.description: Tesla shares popped nearly 8% after CEO Elon Musk touted advances in its latest chips on social media.

item.title: Democratic Senator slams X Money in blistering letter to Elon Musk
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) wrote a blistering letter to X Corp. owner Elon Musk on Apr. 14.

item.title: Stocks Spring Forward in Record-Breaking Day
item.description: Buoyed by big gains from the likes of Microsoft and Tesla, the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95–rallying into the close to finish comfortably above its previous all-time high set in January. Technology stocks were the big outperformers.

item.title: Tech Stocks Power S&P 500 and Nasdaq to Records
item.description: Surging tech stocks carried the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite to new records on Wednesday, a milestone in major indexes’ rebound from war-fueled losses. Buoyed by big gains from the likes of Microsoft and Tesla the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95—rallying into the close to finish comfortably abov...

item.title: The Mystery Behind Tesla Stock’s Sudden Rise
item.description: The gain comes as TD Cowen analyst Itay Michaeli lowered his price target to $490 from $519. CEO Elon Musk appears to be one of the reasons for the stock’s jump. Early Wednesday, Musk tweeted a picture of a Tesla-designed microchip, dubbed AI5.

item.title: Tesla Regains 50-Day Line. Here's When The Stock Could Become Actionable.
item.description: On Wednesday, Tesla stock had one of its best days in months, as it looks to end an eight-week losing streak. Tesla stock could become actionable if it makes a decisive move above the 200-day line. Tesla is due to report first-quarter earnings on April 22.

item.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Globalstar, Tesla, HighPeak Energy, Shopify, and TransDigm
item.description: Check out the companies making headlines yesterday:

item.title: Uber and Lyft Gain 7% as Bold Bets on Robotaxis and Buybacks Reignite Investor Excitement
item.description: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) stock is up 7% today, rising from $72.91 to $77.76, while Lyft (NASDAQ:LYFT) stock is up 7% as well, climbing from $13.71 to $14.66. Both rideshare giants are surging midday as investors respond to a wave of autonomous vehicle commitments and shareholder-friendly cap...

item.title: Uber strengthens self-driving ambitions with new Lucid investment, analysts say
item.description: Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER, XETRA:UT8) has increased its investment in Lucid Group Inc (NASDAQ:LCID) and expanded its vehicle purchase commitment, signaling a stronger push into autonomous ride-hailing, according to Bank of America. The ride-hailing company will invest an additional...

item.title: Tesla intertwines FSD with in-house Insurance for attractive incentive
item.description: Tesla intertwined its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) suite with its in-house Insurance initiative in an effort to offer an attractive incentive to drivers. Tesla announced that its new Safety Score 3.0 will automatically have a perfect score of 100 with every mile driven with Full Self-Driving (S...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Up 7%. Are Tweets Driving the Gains?
item.description: FEATURE Tesla stock is suddenly on fire. The reasons aren’t clear. CEO Elon Musk is the best explanation for the jump.

item.title: Tesla stock jumps 8% on AI chip milestone announcement
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares rose as much as 8% on Wednesday after Chief Executive Elon Musk announced the company’s chip design team completed the "tape out" of its AI5 chip.

item.title: Tesla ‘Full Self-Driving’ crashed through railroad gate seconds before train
item.description: A Texas Tesla owner says he punched the accelerator to outrun an oncoming train after his car on “Full Self-Driving” drove itself through a lowered railroad crossing arm as the train closed in on the tracks. Joshua Brown, who says he has logged more than 40,000 miles using Tesla’s driver assist, ...

item.title: Tesla finalizes AI5 chip design, Elon Musk makes bold claim on capability
item.description: Tesla has finalized its chip design for AI5, as Elon Musk confirmed today that the new chip has reached the tape-out stage, the final step before mass production. But in a brief reply on X, Musk clarified Tesla’s AI hardware roadmap, essentially confirming that the new chip will not be utilized f...

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, Tesla, Nvidia, Robinhood, Broadcom, Nike, and More
item.description: Shares of Morgan Stanley and Bank of America rise as a flood of bank earnings continues into a second day.

item.title: Spin Pressure On Tesla Stock Into A Return With A Cash-Secured Put
item.description: Tesla stock is down more than 20% from its 52-week high. This trade can generate a 13% annualized return or offer discounted shares.

item.title: Tesla Rockets 8% as AI5 Milestone and Rare Analyst Upgrade Remind Bears What This Stock Can Do
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is up 8% in midday trading on Wednesday, rising from $364.20 to $392 as two catalysts hit the tape in quick succession. The move is drawing attention from both sides of a deeply divided investor base, and it’s the kind of day that reminds the bears exactly what this stoc...
